question: For the `Book` class (from Q1), overload the stream insertion operator (`<<`) to enable printing `Book` objects directly to `std::cout` in a formatted way (e.g., 'Title: ... Author: ... ISBN: ...').

test_cases.input: Book("The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy", "Douglas Adams", "978-0345391803")
test_cases.expected: Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy Author: Douglas Adams ISBN: 978-0345391803
Title: Brave New World Author: Aldous Huxley ISBN: N/A
Title: N/A Author: N/A ISBN: N/A
Title: The Great Gatsby Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald ISBN: 978-0743273565
